subject: WM-0087 review: changes_requested
body: High: WM-0087 cannot be verified while required pnpm bench is reported failed on protected m5-alpha-content-long-run at +92.81% (143.905 ms vs 74.634 ms). This violates WM-0087 requiredChecks and ownerGate (>20% regression without accepted explanation) and AGENTS DoD requiring related tests pass/no performance budget regression. Browser evidence/tooling and demo-only tier reporting otherwise look properly scoped.
